security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; object-src 'none'

bundle.longDescription: VigilCut helps content creators cut silences, enhance audio, adjust color, and review every decision before export — fully offline.
